## Summary
- _Why is this change needed?_ Provide a concise description.

## Testing
- [ ] `pnpm lint`
- [ ] `pnpm type-check`
- [ ] `pnpm build`
- [ ] Manual QA (describe below)

Manual QA notes:

## Screenshots (if applicable)
_Add before/after visuals for UI work._

## Checklist
- [ ] Linked to an issue (or marked as `no-issue`).
- [ ] Added docs or comments where necessary.
- [ ] No sensitive data included.
- [ ] Accessibility reviewed for UI changes.
